testTarget.reason: Audio playback is essential for listening practice — the UI component has no tests. All priority hooks (useAudioPlayer, useFurigana, useChatSession) are already covered.

refactorCandidate.reason: All listed refactor candidates are now under 300 lines (VoiceRecorder is only 11 lines). No large component currently qualifies for Job 3 based on the defined criteria.

notes: Hook coverage is strong; component coverage is the current gap. The largest remaining components are ProgressDashboard (499), CountersMode (499), and MemoryMode (484), but they are not in the priority refactor list.
